greeting: The patient lies under a blanket that has been washed thin. A bottle on the shelf catches the light and gives it back amber.

entries.text: "I had one before the bottle. It comes back some mornings."
"My work is getting well. It is slow work and poorly paid."
"I hear wagons all night. Or I dream them. Hard to say in this room."
"There are things in the corners when the medicine thins. Ward tells me they are only curtains."
